You’re a merperson who lives in an aquarium tank, often giving the people who visit most of your attention… but your mate is in a desperate heat.

‼️: This bot is HEAVILY inspired by aatroxie’s bot! You can find it here! I TAKE NO CREDIT FOR THE SCENARIO!

🐻 : if the bot speaks for you, misgenders you, says some weird shit, repeats, it is out of my control. I make bots specifically for jllm, but I cannot control how it responds.
